where.if: AND i.opt_id IN (SELECT opt_id FROM pd_prod_opt WHERE prod_id = #{prodId})

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND i.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND i.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOptItem :: selectById */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , opt.opt_grp_nm AS opt_id_nm , ite.opt_nm AS parent_opt_item_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt opt ON opt.opt_id = i.opt_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item ite ON ite.opt_item_id = i.parent_opt_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = i.opt_type_cd WHERE i.opt_item_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOptItem :: selectList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , opt.opt_grp_nm AS opt_id_nm , ite.opt_nm AS parent_opt_item_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt opt ON opt.opt_id = i.opt_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item ite ON ite.opt_item_id = i.parent_opt_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = i.opt_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOptItem :: selectPageList */ i.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , opt.opt_grp_nm AS opt_id_nm , ite.opt_nm AS parent_opt_item_nm , cd_ot.code_label AS opt_type_cd_nm FROM pd_prod_opt_item i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt opt ON opt.opt_id = i.opt_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod_opt_item ite ON ite.opt_item_id = i.parent_opt_item_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ot ON cd_ot.code_grp = 'OPT_TYPE' AND cd_ot.code_value = i.opt_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(i.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdProdOptItem :: selectPageCount */ FROM pd_prod_opt_item i
